texto: Women’s liberation did not see the female’s potential in terms of the male’s actual
autor: the visionary feminists of the late sixties and early seventies knew that women could never find freedom by agreeing to live the lives of unfree men.
explicacao: Citação de the visionary feminists of the late sixties and early seventies knew that women could never find freedom by agreeing to live the lives of unfree men. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Women’s liberation did not see the female’s potential in terms of the male’s actual” articula reflexao, germaine-greer, the-whole-woman em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como the-whole-woman.
